name: Leanstral 1.5
description: Leanstral 1.5 is a Mistral Labs model post-trained from Mistral Small 4 for Lean theorem-proving workflows. Mistral exposes labs-leanstral-1-5 and labs-leanstral-1-5-1 as reciprocal aliases for the same underlying release.

details.name: upstream_discovery
details.value: Mistral model metadata observed on 2026-06-30 lists labs-leanstral-1-5 and labs-leanstral-1-5-1 with the same created timestamp, description, context length, capabilities, and reciprocal aliases.
